title: 80% Abandoned Villages
description: Increases the abandoned/zombie village amount from vanilla's 2%, up to 80%.
body:
![a village filled with cobwebs and without villagers in a meadow, with a cherry grove, ice spikes and frozen peak in the backdrop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fLAIO8XF/images/ca9af8aeb7e27afcfbdb0c94c345338069d2f6d4.png)

### An attempt to restore some of the "lonely", dream-like feeling of older Minecraft to the modern game.
- 80% of all villages will be abandoned villages, compared to 2% in the base game
